Motion To Compel Responses To 1. Special Interrogatories 2. Request For Production Of Documents; 3. Request For Admissions; 4. Sanctions

Prove-Up Hearing As To Deft Western Macarthur By Plft Sonny Jennings(Asbestos)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: CHRIS ANDREAS, Esq. of Brayton-Purcell, 415/898-1555 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff SONNY JENNINGS and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $310,600.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Apr-16-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: M. TORREANO, #8600 (503)
